title: iria hookeriana
intro: Iria hookeriana, also known as the Kukui nut tree, is a flowering plant native to the Pacific Islands. The plant's leaves and seeds have been used in traditional medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Iria hookeriana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations include infusing the leaves in water to create a tea, or using the seeds as an oil for topical applications.
